log_metadata.name: Synthetic Wheelchair Assistance Dispatch & Incident Log
embedded_patterns_for_analysis: Terminal C WCHC requests breach the 15-min SLA ~70% of the time (staffing gap, worsens after mid-April)
International arrivals show a cluster of powered mobility device damage (~50% of powered-chair arrivals)
Gate B12 connections frequently miss (tight minimum connect time + late escort dispatch)
Weekend response times run 4-8 minutes higher across all terminals
WCLB/OXYG requests suffer documentation delays at check-in
log_metadata.note: Synthetic data. Patterns are intentionally embedded so RAG trend queries return meaningful answers.
